query:
-- Çift KPI maddelerini tespit et
SELECT 
  period, 
  branchName, 
  kpiName, 
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM kpi_target_cards_detail
GROUP BY period, branchName, kpiName
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY count DESC;

-- Çift KPI maddelerini teke düşür - her grup için ilk kaydı tut, diğerlerini sil
DELETE FROM kpi_target_cards_detail
WHERE id NOT IN (
  SELECT MIN(id)
  FROM (
    SELECT MIN(id) as id
    FROM kpi_target_cards_detail
    GROUP BY period, branchName, kpiName
  ) as keep_ids
);
